docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST GENE A. FARBER, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-04-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-19-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
